PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($data.tool_name -eq 'write' -or $data.tool_name -eq 'edit') { $path = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($path -match 'Convy\.Domain' -and $path -notmatch 'Tests') { $content = if ($data.tool_input.content) { $data.tool_input.content } elseif ($data.tool_input.new_string) { $data.tool_input.new_string } else { '' }; if ($content -match 'using Convy\.Infrastructure|using Microsoft\.EntityFrameworkCore|using Npgsql') { Write-Output '{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Domain layer must not reference Infrastructure or EF Core\"}' } } }"
